## Epic 5 — Magic System (#59)

**Dependency:** #50, #51
**Est. Effort:** Extra Large

### Goal
Design and write all divine spell/prayer chains for the Shepherd class (and any other divine casters).

### Divine Magic Distinction
- Arcane = manipulation of natural forces (Fire, Wind, Energy)
- Divine = channeling of higher power (Protection, Animal, Energy)
- Spells focus on: healing, protection, buffing, radiant damage, restoration

### Divine Chains
| Chain | Novice | Adept | Master | Dice Req |
|-------|--------|-------|--------|----------|
| Healing Touch | Cure Wounds | Prayer of Healing | Mass Cure Wounds | Animal |
| Life Restoration | Spare the Dying | Revivify | Raise Dead | Animal + Protection |
| Divine Shield | Shield of Faith | Aid | Death Ward | Protection |
| Holy Light | Sacred Flame | Guiding Bolt | Flame Strike | Energy |
| Divine Wrath | Divine Favor | Spirit Guardians | Destructive Wave | Energy + Protection |
| Blessings | Bless | Beacon of Hope | Holy Aura | Protection + Energy |
| Restoration | Lesser Restoration | Greater Restoration | Heal | Animal + Energy |
| Sanctuary | Sanctuary | Magic Circle | Hallow | Protection |
| Spirit Communion | Speak with Dead | Commune | Contact Other Plane | Animal + Knowledge |
| Divine Word | Command | Zone of Truth | Banishment | Reason |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design 25-35 divine spells across 10+ chains
- [ ] Write each with Weak/Standard/Strong effects
- [ ] Write as formatted AsciiDoc entries
- [ ] Ensure mechanical distinction from arcane spells
